author: y4rr
content:
Result: Sprint V.1 ConvNeXt + EfficientNet forward parity complete.

Delivered:
1. scripts/regenerate_vision_v_fixtures.py — extended with V.1 ConvNeXt-Tiny and EfficientNet-B0 sections (torchvision seeded fixture generation)
2. ferrotorch-vision/tests/conformance/fixtures_v_parity.json — 10 new fixture entries (5 per model)
3. ferrotorch-vision/tests/conformance_vision_models.rs — 10 new test functions (5 per model, matching V.3/V.4 audit pattern)

Test evidence:
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision --test conformance_vision_models: 100/100 PASS
- cargo build --workspace: CLEAN
- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets: CLEAN (pre-existing unused import warning in conformance_shape.rs unrelated to sprint)

Issues closed: #930, #931
